channel.title: Soulaani Blue Blog
channel.description: Stories, updates, and reflections from Soulaani Blue's journey.

item.title: From Classroom Cover to Healing Anthem: The Story of "Operator"
item.description: I found a video on my phone the other day. August 2024. I was in my classroom recording myself singing Anita Baker's "I Apologize." ...

item.title: The Song That Chose Me: The Story of "Rather Be"
item.description: There are songs you write. And then there are songs that write you. "Rather Be" is the second kind. I wrote the first verse in a rented room at Ms. Caldwell's house...

item.title: Same (Ole Lady)
item.description: I wrote this because I got tired of lying to myself. "This what I get for not having the words." ...

item.title: The Flower That Grew Into a Song (Repeat)
item.description: I wrote the first lines of "Repeat" in 2023, sitting on a friend's couch with nowhere else to go. ...

item.title: Why I Left YouTube
item.description: I moved my videos to Odysee because I couldn't keep feeding a platform that profits from harm. ...

item.title: February: First Sales, First Donations, and 'Dead Man Walkin'
item.description: February was heavy. The world kept spinning in its same cruel way. ...
